backend.changelog: Fixes the 'generate anyway' confirmation so it also appears when SolidWorks (or the assembly) was closed and Generate opens it -- previously the engage step waited indefinitely for you to close documents that can't be closed (auto-resolved references). Confirming once now lets Generate proceed. Also: the page no longer shows a 502 right after Apply Update (it waits for the new backend before redirecting), and the BOM tooltip 'Copy id' button copies reliably. Source freshness unchanged.

cadBridge.changelog: Stability fix: reverts the automatic 'clean session' behaviour added in 1.8.56, which on large assemblies could close and reopen the model, mark documents as changed, and slow Generate down. Generate now behaves exactly as it did in 1.8.55. Recommended update for anyone on 1.8.56. To avoid the revision-conflict dialog on large assemblies, open the assembly into an empty SolidWorks session (close all documents first).
